title: Peppery Peruvian Tortilla Wrap
description: A low-calorie-friendly peppery peruvian dish featuring a tender tortilla wrapped with flavorful peppers and other low-calorie-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat a skillet over medium-high heat. Heat olive oil, add chili powder and cumin.
Add diced bell peppers to the skillet with the spices. Stir occasionally until peppers are tender (about 8 minutes).
Remove from heat. Lay out tortillas on a clean surface. Spoon the spicy pepper mixture onto one half of each tortilla.
Fold tortillas in half and wrap like a burrito. Serve immediately.
